title: Update About Section Right Column to Side-by-Side McKinley School Photos

requirements.text: Update the right column of the AboutSection component to display two images side-by-side: a historic 1902 photo of McKinley Elementary School in Spokane, WA on the left, and a current gymnasium photo of McKinley Elementary School in Spokane, WA on the right. Each image should be clearly labeled (e.g., '1902' and 'Today' or 'Historic' and 'Current Gymnasium'). The layout must remain visually balanced within the two-column About section.

quotes: Right: side-by-side historic 1902 photo and current gymnasium photo of McKinley Elementary School Spokane, WA.

acceptanceCriteria: The right column of the About section shows exactly two images displayed side-by-side horizontally.
The left image depicts McKinley Elementary School in a historic 1902 style.
The right image depicts the current gymnasium of McKinley Elementary School in Spokane, WA.
Both images have clear descriptive labels visible beneath or overlaid on them.
The side-by-side layout is visually balanced and does not break the two-column About section layout.
Images are rendered from static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated.

constraints: Do not alter the overall two-column layout of the AboutSection component.
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Changes to the left column of the About section.
Changes to any other page or section.

required: Historic sepia-toned exterior photograph style illustration of a classic early 1900s brick elementary school building with period-accurate architectural details, labeled '1902' (mckinley-1902.dim_600x400.png)

Bright modern interior gymnasium of an elementary school with hardwood floors, basketball hoops, and bleachers in a contemporary Pacific Northwest school setting (mckinley-gymnasium-current.dim_600x400.png)
